response.global_analysis: The video segment contains a vocal performance of an original song, a spoken segment for merchandise promotion, and an instrumental guitar medley. The Reference JSON provided no lyrics, so I transcribed the audio directly. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, and on-screen titles for the instrumental sections are included for context.

subtitles.original: アッチカッチ アッチカッチ
subtitles.english: Atchi-kotchi, atchi-kotchi

subtitles.original: Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: 信じられない オールマイティー マイナスの連鎖
subtitles.english: Unbelievable, almighty, a chain of negatives

subtitles.original: いつの世も 過去も未来も 今にあるんだ
subtitles.english: In any age, the past and future are in the now

subtitles.original: 生きていることを 愚直に歌うよ 目指せハッピーエンド
subtitles.english: I'll sing truthfully about being alive toward a happy ending

subtitles.original: Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: 信じられない お前に言ってるんだ
subtitles.english: Unbelievable, I'm talking to you

subtitles.original: 幸せを究めてしまわない ひとであれ
subtitles.english: Be a person who never stops seeking happiness

subtitles.original: ただ苦しみに慣れて耐えているだけじゃ
subtitles.english: If you just get used to suffering and endure it

subtitles.original: 死んでるも同然 屍のアゲた
subtitles.english: You're as good as dead, the shout of a corpse

subtitles.original: 悩み事なんてないさ そんな奴もいないさ
subtitles.english: There are no worries, no one is like that

subtitles.original: 止まらず目指せよ 生きているんだろ
subtitles.english: Don't stop, aim high, you're alive, aren't you?

subtitles.original: 不幸に浸るも 幸せになるのも
subtitles.english: Wallowing in misery or becoming happy

subtitles.original: 全部全部お前だ ここに存在さ 咲かせ新天地
subtitles.english: It's all up to you, your existence is here, make the new world bloom

subtitles.original: P-P-P-Patra
subtitles.english: P-P-P-Patra

subtitles.original: パ！ エクスタシー！ キャプテンザパ！
subtitles.english: Pa! Ecstasy! Captain the Pa!

subtitles.original: パ！ エクスタシー！ ラブフォーザフューチャー！
subtitles.english: Pa! Ecstasy! Love for the future!

subtitles.original: 人並み外れた いつも例えがたい
subtitles.english: Extraordinary and always hard to describe

subtitles.original: 生き抜くこの化物ばかりのモノ語り
subtitles.english: Surviving this story full of nothing but monsters

subtitles.original: ちゃっかりしっかり 誕生日グッズのお知らせだよ
subtitles.english: Casually but firmly, here's an announcement for birthday goods!

subtitles.original: なんと パトラのでっかいマウスパッドや バスタオル
subtitles.english: We have Patra's giant mousepad and a bath towel!

subtitles.original: そして とっても可愛いアクリルスタンド A4サイズのファイル
subtitles.english: And a very cute acrylic stand and A4 size files.

subtitles.original: いろんなグッズがある誕生日グッズが登場だよ
subtitles.english: A variety of birthday goods are now available!

subtitles.original: 受注生産なので 売り切れの心配なし
subtitles.english: They're made-to-order, so no need to worry about sell-outs.

subtitles.original: 8月30日までの受付です
subtitles.english: Orders are accepted until August 30th.

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします
subtitles.english: Please check them out!
